core_mechanism: a trace formula expressing the discrete spectrum (eigenvalues) of a linear operator as an exact sum over the periodic orbits of an associated deterministic dynamical system, with the universal statistics of that spectrum tied to the exponential proliferation of orbits under mixing (chaotic) dynamics
brief_reason: The abstract builds an exact trace formula for the quantum spectrum in terms of periodic orbits of a classical phase space whose dynamics is mixing and whose orbits proliferate exponentially, using this orbit sum to explain the spectrum's random-matrix statistics.
